items.title: WorldDirector: Building Controllable World Simulators with Persistent Dynamic Memory
items.title_cn: WorldDirector: Building Controllable World Simulators with Persistent Dynamic Memory
items.summary: We present WorldDirector, a highly controllable video world model framework designed for persistent dynamic object memory and unrestricted viewpoint exploration. Unlike existing world models that entangle physical dynamics with pixel rendering and rely on continuous visual observation to sustain mot...

items.title: Alignment Is All You Need For X-to-4D Generation
items.title_cn: Alignment Is All You Need For X-to-4D Generation
items.summary: Generative diffusion models excel at synthesizing high-quality images, videos, and 3D content under multimodal control. items.title: Distributed Attacks in Persistent-State AI Control
items.title_cn: Distributed Attacks in Persistent-State AI Control
items.summary: As AI coding agents become more autonomous, they increasingly ship code iteratively, with the codebase persisting across sessions. This persistence creates a new attack surface: a misaligned or prompt-injected agent can distribute attacks across pull requests (PRs) and time its payload for the PR wi...

items.title: PointDiT: Pixel-Space Diffusion for Monocular Geometry Estimation
items.title_cn: PointDiT: Pixel-Space Diffusion for Monocular Geometry Estimation

items.title: LACUNA: A Testbed for Evaluating Localization Precision for LLM Unlearning
items.title_cn: LACUNA: A Testbed for Evaluating Localization Precision for LLM Unlearning
items.summary: LLMs memorize sensitive training data, including personally identifiable information (PII), creating a pressing need for reliable post hoc removal methods. items.title: Program-as-Weights: A Programming Paradigm for Fuzzy Functions
items.title_cn: Program-as-Weights: A Programming Paradigm for Fuzzy Functions
items.summary: Many everyday programming tasks resist clean rule-based implementation, such as alerting on important log lines, repairing malformed JSON, or ranking search results by intent, and are increasingly outsourced to large language model APIs at the cost of locality, reproducibility, and price. We propose...

items.title: Online Safety Monitoring for LLMs
items.title_cn: Online Safety Monitoring for LLMs
items.summary: Despite alignment training, LLMs remain prone to generating unsafe outputs at deployment time. Monitoring outputs online and raising an alarm when safety can no longer be assumed is therefore critical. We study a simple real-time monitor that turns a verifier signal from an external model into an al...

items.title: ReContext: Recursive Evidence Replay as LLM Harness for Long-Context Reasoning
items.title_cn: ReContext: Recursive Evidence Replay as LLM Harness for Long-Context Reasoning

Although recent LLMs support increasingly long context windows, they often fail to use relevant evidence that is already present in the input, revealing a...

items.title: From SRA to Self-Flow: Data Augmentation or Self-Supervision?

items.title_cn: What LLM Agents Say When No One Is Watching: Social Structure and Latent Objective Emergence in Multi-Agent Debates

items.title: Seek to Segment: Active Perception for Panoramic Referring Segmentation

items.title: Controllable Sim Agents with Behavior Latents
items.title_cn: Controllable Sim Agents with Behavior Latents

items.title: G-RRM: Guiding Symbolic Solvers with Recurrent Reasoning Models

items.title: Audio-Based Understanding of Audiobook Narration Appeal
items.title_cn: Audio-Based Understanding of Audiobook Narration Appeal
items.summary: Narration is central to the audiobook listening experience, shaping how listeners engage with and understand the content. items.title: Will Scaling Improve Social Simulation with LLMs?
items.title_cn: Will Scaling Improve Social Simulation with LLMs?
items.summary: Large Language Model (LLM) social simulations are a promising research method, but they are not yet faithful enough to be adopted widely. items.title: OrbitQuant: Data-Agnostic Quantization for Image and Video Diffusion Transformers

items.title: Language Models as Measurement Apparatus for Culture
items.title_cn: Language Models as Measurement Apparatus for Culture
items.summary: Language models are increasingly used to quantify cultural phenomena, but what makes such measurement distinctively cultural?
